title: calamus perakensis var. lanatus
intro: Calamus perakensis var. lanatus, also known as the hairy calamus, is a variant of the calamus plant that belongs to the family Zingiberaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The hairy calamus is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as possessing antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of the hairy calamus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
